TEXT  
THIS IS A JAVA PROGRAM THAT USES DIFFERENT KEYWORDS INCLUDING THE ONE USED TO DEFINE A CLASS. IT DEMONSTRATES PROPER SYNTAX USE AND AVOIDS COMMON ERRORS. THE PROGRAM INCLUDES A CLASS DEFINITION WITH A METHOD THAT USES A VARIABLE AND A LOOP. THE PROGRAM ALSO USES A BOOLEAN VALUE AND A STRING VARIABLE TO SHOW HOW KEYWORDS WORK IN JAVA. THE PROGRAM IS STRUCTURED TO SHOW HOW KEYWORDS ARE USED IN A PROGRAMMING CONTEXT.  
***
